overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing Batman running along elevated train tracks in a dark, gothic city. A train passes by on an adjacent track as the scene transitions from a covered industrial bridge to an open-air view of the city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track in covered industrial bridge

events.description: commuter train with headlights on approaches from the distance on the parallel track

agents.ego_description: Batman running steadily along the elevated tracks toward the approaching train

notable_agents.action: commuter train approaching with bright headlights visible in the distance

entered.detail: arched glass and metal roof structure covering the elevated tracks with teal lighting
heavy industrial support columns lining both sides of the track
metal railway tracks with walkway panels extending into the distance
dark silhouettes of art deco skyscrapers visible through the far end of the structure

segments.scene_description: Batman runs along elevated train tracks inside a covered industrial bridge with a glass roof. A commuter train approaches from the distance with its headlights cutting through the dim, artificially lit corridor. Gothic city buildings are visible through the far end of the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track with passing train

events.description: train arrives at the platform area and begins passing by on the right track
train passes at closest point to Batman, moving at high speed

agents.ego_description: Batman continues running forward as the train thunders past on the adjacent track

notable_agents.action: commuter train cars rushing past at high speed on the parallel track

entered.detail: metal safety barriers and railings along the right side of the track

segments.scene_description: The commuter train passes by at high speed on the right track, its cars rushing past Batman as he continues running forward. The covered structure continues overhead with metal support pillars receding into the background. Industrial barriers line the right side of the walkway as the train's motion creates a dynamic sense of speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated railway approaching city center

events.description: exits the covered glass roof structure into open air with full view of the night sky

agents.ego_description: Batman running along the tracks as the environment opens up to reveal the expansive city skyline

entered.detail: orange construction cones placed on the track walkway
dark cloudy night sky becoming visible as the roof ends
metal scaffolding structures on the right side of the tracks

segments.scene_description: After the train passes, Batman continues along the tracks as the covered structure gradually opens up to the sky. Orange traffic cones appear on the tracks ahead, and the gothic skyline of the city becomes fully visible against the dark, cloudy night sky. The environment transitions from enclosed industrial corridor to open elevated railway with scaffolding and barriers lining the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Batman runs along elevated train tracks, transitioning from a confined industrial corridor into an open-air view of a gothic city. It begins inside a covered bridge with a glass roof, where the dim artificial light is pierced by the headlights of an approaching commuter train. As the train rushes past at high speed on the adjacent track, the camera maintains its forward momentum past receding metal support pillars and industrial barriers. The scene then opens up as the overhead structure gives way to the night sky, revealing orange traffic cones on the path ahead. Finally, the environment expands into an open elevated railway, fully exposing the dark, cloudy skyline of the gothic city beyond the scaffolding.
